rules.rule_text:
rule VertexNet
{
	meta:
		author = "Brian Wallace @botnet_hunter"
		author_email = "bwall@ballastsecurity.net"
		date = "2015-03-25"
		description = "Identify VertexNet"

	strings:
		$s1 = "vertexnet" nocase
		$s2 = "urldl::"
		$s3 = "%LAPPDATA%"
		$s4 = "[ERROR] while loading ressource"

	condition:
		all of them
}
